    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final CritterClassLoader
    BaseGizmoGenerator.critterClassLoader
    The class loader used to register generated class bytecode.
    Methods in dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo with parameters of type CritterClassLoader in in
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GizmoEntityModelGenerator
    CritterGizmoGenerator.entityModel(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.ClassNode classNode, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Generates and registers the entity model class for the given type.
    GizmoEntityModelGenerator
    CritterGizmoGenerator.generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader)
    Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes using build-time (non-runtime) mode.
    GizmoEntityModelGenerator
    CritterGizmoGenerator.generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, boolean runtimeMode)
    Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes.
    PropertyAccessorGenerator
    CritterGizmoGenerator.propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
    Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given field.
    PropertyAccessorGenerator
    CritterGizmoGenerator.propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given getter method.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGizmoGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGizmoGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the property exposed by the given getter method.
    VarHandleAccessorGenerator
    CritterGizmoGenerator.varHandleAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
    Generates and registers a VarHandle-based accessor for the given field (used in runtime mode).
    VarHandleAccessorGenerator
    CritterGizmoGenerator.varHandleAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
    Generates and registers a VarHandle-based accessor for the property exposed by the given getter method (used in runtime mode).
    Constructors in dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo with parameters of type CritterClassLoader in in
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    BaseGizmoGenerator(Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader)
    Creates a new generator for the given entity using the supplied class loader.
     
    GizmoEntityModelGenerator(Mapper mapper, Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.ClassNode classNode, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Creates a new entity model generator for the given entity.
     
    PropertyAccessorGenerator(Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
    Creates a generator for a property accessor backed by a field.
     
    PropertyAccessorGenerator(Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
    Creates a generator for a property accessor backed by a getter method.
     
    PropertyModelGenerator(MorphiaConfig config, Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
    Creates a generator for a field-based property.
     
    PropertyModelGenerator(MorphiaConfig config, Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
    Creates a generator for a method-based (getter) property.
     
    VarHandleAccessorGenerator(Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
    Creates a generator for a field-based property accessor using a VarHandle.
     
    VarHandleAccessorGenerator(Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
    Creates a generator for a method-based property accessor using MethodHandles.
